metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4178
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig3: BDNF-IR does not colocalize with the synaptic vesicle markers synaptophysin (Dand E) or VGlut (F and G) but colocalises with opioid peptide Met-enkephalin (H-M) and neuropeptide cholecystokinin (N-P).
Fig 4A: Immunogold labelling showed gold clusters to be associated with large vesicles encompassed by an electron-dense membrane.

The specificity of the antibodies used in the study (anti-myc and anti-BDNF) was validated in previous literature. The anti-Myc antibody specifically detects BDNF as it uses a BDNF knockin line allowing the use of antibodies directed against a tagged version of the BDNF gene (Matsumoto et al., 2008). While the specificity of the anti-BDNF antibody is observed in a line conditionally lacking BDNF in adult neurons (Rauskolb et al., 2010).. Experimental description: For the confocal and EM study, brains were obtained from Bdnf-Myc (Matsumoto et al., 2008) and WT (C57Bl6) respectively.
